docs.title: Container Layout Backbone
docs.body: Use a root Column for vertical flow, then wrap section blocks in Container widgets with explicit padding and alignment. Keep width constraints near section boundaries to avoid surprise overflow on tablet breakpoints.

docs.title: Large List Performance
docs.body: Prefer lazily built list widgets and keep item trees shallow. Avoid nested scroll views, and compute expensive formatting before rendering to reduce rebuild churn.

docs.title: Conditional Display Patterns
docs.body: Attach conditions to the smallest subtree possible. Keep fallback states explicit, and ensure at least one branch produces semantic content for empty and error states.

docs.title: Navigation Guard Action
docs.body: Before navigating, validate required state keys and auth context. Route to a recovery page when guard checks fail, and log the failed predicate for diagnostics.

docs.title: Multi-step Submit Action
docs.body: Model submit flows as Validate -> Loading State -> API Call -> Success/Error branch. Always reset loading state on every exit path.

docs.title: App State Naming Conventions
docs.body: Use verb-free names for values (selectedProjectId) and verb-first names for booleans (isSyncing). Co-locate fields that change together to simplify update actions.

docs.title: Local vs Global State
docs.body: Keep transient UI state local to a page/component. Promote only cross-route, durable, or auth-coupled values to app state.

docs.title: Form Binding and Validation
docs.body: Bind input values to state with clear source-of-truth semantics. Validation messages should map one-to-one with fields and run before side effects.

docs.title: Theme Color Scale
docs.body: Define base, contrast, and muted tones as a scale rather than ad hoc colors. Use semantic aliases (success, warning, danger) to decouple UI meaning from raw values.

docs.title: Typography Rhythm
docs.body: Limit body text to one default size and one compact size. Reserve larger variants for hierarchy anchors such as page headers and dialog titles.

docs.title: API Retry and Backoff
docs.body: Retry only idempotent calls with jittered backoff. Surface retry state to users after the first retry so failures are visible and actionable.

docs.title: Auth Refresh Handling
docs.body: When auth tokens expire, pause dependent actions, refresh credentials, and replay queued requests once. If refresh fails, clear secure state and redirect to login.

docs.title: Read-only Zones
docs.body: Treat custom code folders and unlocked runtime entry points as read-only during automated edits. Provide manual payloads instead of direct mutation for those areas.

docs.title: Changeset Review Checklist
docs.body: Review file count, changed line volume, and policy scope before apply. Reject broad edits that combine unrelated intents or cross forbidden boundaries.

docs.title: Deep Link Route Mapping
docs.body: Keep a single route map source and normalize path parameters. Every deep link should land on a valid state with deterministic fallback behavior.

docs.title: Platform Config Bundling
docs.body: Platform configuration updates should be bundled as one apply operation so dependent files stay in sync. Partial platform edits are high risk and should be blocked by policy.

snippets.title: Guarded Navigate Action
snippets.code:
actions:
  - type: conditional
    condition: appState.userId != null
    then:
      - type: navigate
        targetPage: Dashboard
    else:
      - type: navigate
        targetPage: SignIn
snippets.notes: Template guard flow for auth-gated routes.

snippets.title: List Empty State
snippets.code:
children:
  - type: conditional
    condition: items.length == 0
    then:
      type: text
      value: No items yet
    else:
      type: listView
      itemSource: items

snippets.title: Submit Reset Pattern
snippets.code:
actions:
  - type: setState
    path: local.isLoading
    value: true
  - type: apiCall
    key: createOrder
  - type: setState
    path: local.isLoading
    value: false

snippets.title: Semantic Theme Tokens
snippets.code:
theme:
  colors:
    success: '#1f8f5f'
    warning: '#ad7a00'
    danger: '#bf1d2e'
    mutedText: '#606a73'

snippets.title: Component Slot Usage
snippets.code:
component:
  name: CardShell
  slots:
    - header
    - body
    - footer

snippets.title: Platform Bundle Intent
snippets.code:
changeset:
  title: Update Android/iOS identifiers
  intent: Keep platform identifiers aligned across Android and iOS configs

snippets.title: Safe Retry Action
snippets.code:
actions:
  - type: retry
    maxAttempts: 3
    backoffMs: 500
    jitter: true

snippets.title: Expired Token Handler
snippets.code:
actions:
  - type: conditional
    condition: api.error.code == 401
    then:
      - type: navigate
        targetPage: SignIn

snippets.title: Section Wrapper
snippets.code:
widget:
  type: container
  constraints:
    maxWidth: 960
  padding:
    all: 16
